changelog.change: Lower time-update interval to 120 ms and heartbeat to 2 s for snappier live timers.
Single-flight coalesced PATCH queue: no out-of-order total_time and no Task.Run flood.
Detect Game Time pause/resume every LiveSplit frame (removed 500 ms poll timer).
Write requests now use the logged-in JWT (not only the anon key); auto-refresh near expiry.
Debounce opponent list REST refresh on Realtime (max 1 GET / 400 ms).
Fix auto-update URLs to point at the SpeedrunRacing repo (main branch) with correct Components/ layout.
Initial public release of SpeedRun Race Tracker.
